title: polygala rosea subsp. baetica
intro: Polygala rosea subsp. baetica, also known as Baetical polygala, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the milkwort family Polygalaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and may also help to alleviate stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, Baetical polygala is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
